rationale: Ground truth is thin (mostly social comments plus one inline nitpick about reduce_scatter test coverage, which the diff already addresses). X engages more with test-coverage completeness for the new vLLM group additions (RuntimeError path untested, cfg_parallel_size=1 untested), thematically closer to the reviewer's concern, and gives concrete file/line/test suggestions, though several of its nits (docstrings, inline comments) are low-value padding that dilutes precision. Y is well-verified and grounded but essentially rubber-stamps approval with a single soft, non-actionable comment, missing the test-scrutiny angle the human reviewer raised.
